scripts.check: npx --yes hyperframes@0.6.114 lint && npx --yes hyperframes@0.6.114 validate && npx --yes hyperframes@0.6.114 inspect
scripts.tts:setup: uv venv --python 3.12 .venv-tts && uv pip install --python .venv-tts/bin/python edge-tts
scripts.tts:edge: PATH="$PWD/.venv-tts/bin:$PATH" edge-tts --file narration.txt --voice zh-CN-XiaoxiaoNeural --rate=+17% --write-media assets/narration-edge.mp3 && $(node -p "require('@ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg').path") -y -i assets/narration-edge.mp3 -ar 48000 -ac 2 assets/narration.wav && rm -f assets/narration-edge.mp3
scripts.render:local: HYPERFRAMES_FFMPEG_PATH=$(node -p "require('@ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg').path") HYPERFRAMES_FFPROBE_PATH=$(node -p "require('@ffprobe-installer/ffprobe').path") npx --yes hyperframes@0.6.114 render --output renders/deepseek-pp-promo.mp4 --quality standard --fps 30
